text: Moving from the blank, sterile corridor into a vibrant space dedicated to research and development, I feel a shift within myself. The first environment felt cold and distant, almost isolating. Now, confronted with creative displays and bold statements, I'm drawn into a more stimulating atmosphere. The words about misunderstanding and the wish to be understood echo my own inner uncertainty. I am both energized and unsettled by the juxtaposition of intention, perception, and the struggle to connect in this world of ideas.
